summary: Iteration 143: Tested Photo Zoom, AWE Action Buttons, and Linked RST Edit/Delete Hide features. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified all new features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test Mill Entry with RST 1 to verify linked RST behavior, then deleted after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 143 tested: 1) Auto Weight Entries has full action buttons (View/Eye, Edit/Pencil, Print/Printer, Download, Delete/Trash) - VERIFIED. 2) Photo View Dialog opens with print slip layout showing 1st Weight (Gross) and 2nd Weight (Tare) sections with 'No Photo' placeholders - VERIFIED. 3) When RST is linked to Mill Entry, Edit and Delete buttons are hidden and green checkmark shows in both VW and AWE tabs - VERIFIED. 4) GET /api/vehicle-weight/linked-rst returns list of linked RST numbers from Mill Entries - VERIFIED. 5) Photo zoom overlay implementation exists in code (onClick handlers on images set zoomImg state) - CODE VERIFIED.

features_tested.awe_action_buttons: PASS - View (eye), Edit (pencil), Print (printer), Download, Delete (trash) buttons present for non-linked entries
features_tested.awe_filter_bar: PASS - Date From/To, RST, Vehicle, Party, Mandi filters present
features_tested.awe_export_buttons: PASS - Excel and PDF export buttons present and functional
features_tested.photo_dialog_slip_layout: PASS - Print slip layout with company name, RST details, weights, and photo sections
features_tested.photo_dialog_no_photo_placeholders: PASS - 'No Photo' placeholders shown for 1st and 2nd weight photos
features_tested.linked_rst_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/vehicle-weight/linked-rst returns 200 with linked_rst array
features_tested.linked_rst_awe_checkmark: PASS - Green checkmark shown for linked RST entries in AWE tab
features_tested.linked_rst_vw_checkmark: PASS - Green checkmark shown for linked RST entries in VW tab
features_tested.linked_rst_edit_hidden: PASS - Edit button hidden for linked RST entries in both tabs
features_tested.linked_rst_delete_hidden: PASS - Delete button hidden for linked RST entries in both tabs
features_tested.photo_zoom_code_present: PASS - Photo zoom overlay code present (zoomImg state, onClick handlers on images)
